basic_details.job_title: CSU Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 15 Office Assistant, Project Fellow and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Office Assistant, Project Fellow and More Positions
basic_details.short_information: The latest Central Sanskrit University (CSU) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Office Assistant, Project Fellow and More Positions posts! Published on 24 May 2026 at the official website, sanskrit.nic.in, this new recruitment drive offers 15 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants within the below 28 to 40 years age group and possessing qualifications such as Ph.D., Master’s Degree, Bachelor’s Degree, BAMS, MCA/BE/B.Tech, Commerce/Finance/Accounting Degree, or Mass Communication/Media qualifications can apply online from 24-05-2026 to 07-06-2026. Find all details about the CSU Offic

age_limit.details: Post Doctoral Fellow: Preferably below 35 years. Project Fellow:Preferably below 35 years. Office Assistant: Preferably below 35 years. Young Professionals (Ayurveda Gurukulam): Preferably below 28 years Technical Assistant: Preferably below 35 years System Analyst: Preferably below 40 years Account Officer: Preferably below 40 years Video Editor: Preferably below 35 years

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D., Masters/Integrated Masters Degree, Bachelor’s degree, BAMS, MCA/BE/B.Tech, Bachelor’s Degree in Commerce/Finance/Accounting, Bachelor’s Degree or Diploma in Mass Communication/Media/Film/Video Editing
qualification.details: Post Doctoral Fellow: Ph.D., Masters/Integrated Masters Degree in any Sanskrit Shastras from a recognized University or equivalent. Project Fellow: Masters/Integrated Masters Degree in Sanskrit Shastras from a recognized University or equivalent. Office Assistant: Bachelor’s degree in Sanskrit or modern subject from a recognized University or equivalent. Guest Faculty (Yogic Science): Good academic record, with at least 55% marks at the Master’s degree in Yoga or any other relevant subject, or equivalent degree from an Indian/foreign University; cleared NET or Ph.D. in Yoga. Young Professionals (Ayurveda Gurukulam): BAMS Degree from a recognized institution (mandatory). Technical Assistant: MCA/BE/B.Tech in Computer Science/ Information Technology or Allied subjects with ICT Knowledge from AICTI approved/ UGC recognized institute/ university with a minimum of 60% in aggregate/ equivalent grade. System Analyst: B.E./B.Tech. in Computer Science & Engineering/Electronics Engineering with 05 years of programming experience OR M.E./M.Tech. in Computer Science & Engineering/Electronics Engineering/ M.Sc. Computer Science/ MCA with 03 years of programming experience. Account Officer: Bachelor’s Degree in Commerce/Finance/Accounting from a recognized University with a minimum of 02 years of experience in accounting, finance, audit procurement, or related administrative work. Video Editor: Bachelor’s Degree in Mass Communication/Media Studies/Film Production/Animation/Multimedia/Computer Applications or equivalent OR Diploma/Certificate in Video Editing/Film Editing/Multimedia with relevant experience.

salary_details.details: Post Doctoral Fellow: Rs.75,000/- per month fixed Project Fellow: Rs. 50,000/- per month fixed Office Assistant: Rs. 35,000/- per month fixed Guest Faculty (Yogic Science): Rs. 50,000/- per month fixed Young Professionals (Ayurveda Gurukulam): Between Rs.40,000 to Rs.60,000 per month fixed Technical Assistant: Rs. 35,000/- per month fixed System Analyst: Between Rs. 60,000 to Rs. 75,000/- per month fixed Account Officer: Between Rs. 50,000 to Rs. 60,000/- per month fixed Video Editor: Rs. 25,000/- per month fixed

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 07-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CSU to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CSU recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the Central Sanskrit University recruitment is 07 June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in the CSU recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 15 vacancies announced for various contractual positions in the Central Sanskrit University.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for CSU recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply for the CSU recruitment through the online mode only.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for CSU recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category in the CSU recruitment notification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the minimum qualification required for the Project Fellow post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required for the Project Fellow post is a Masters/Integrated Masters Degree in Sanskrit Shastras from a recognized University or equivalent.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary for the Post Doctoral Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Post Doctoral Fellow position will receive a fixed salary of Rs.75,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for CSU recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for CSU recruitment includes a Test and/or Interview, followed by Document Verification.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification for CSU recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link is provided in the "Important Links" section of this article.

faq.question: Q9. What is the starting date for online application submission?
faq.answer: The online application submission for CSU recruitment starts on 24 May 2026.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of Central Sanskrit University?
faq.answer: The official website of Central Sanskrit University is www.sanskrit.nic.in.
